findings: Multiple backward and forward bulk and flag features exhibit extremely low cardinality with near-constant values across the partition, confirming low cardinality as a potential shortcut signal.
Cardinality verification for Bwd PSH Flags and Fwd URG Flags confirmed low cardinality and near-constant behavior.
Local tension between low cardinality features and other features with strong class-conditioned variation is preserved.
limitations: Distribution verification was not performed due to budget exhaustion, limiting full stability assessment of value distributions across partitions.
